name: Passion Studio
description: A bold custom logo rug in black with hand-tufted white bubble lettering spelling 'PASSION.' Clean, high-contrast design perfect as a studio or brand statement piece.

name: BMW Rug
description: A detailed hand-tufted portrait of a BMW in black and grey tones, capturing sharp body lines, blue-tinted headlights, and fine shading. A striking custom piece for car enthusiasts.

name: KoobFul Rug
description: A flower-shaped rug in soft cream with flowing maroon Arabic calligraphy and delicate pink floral accents, featuring the nested 'Koobful' wordmark. Romantic and detailed custom brand piece.

name: 25th Birthday Rug
description: A heart-shaped rug in pastel pink and lavender with a checkered pattern, maroon trim, and delicate bow details framing a hand-tufted 'twenty five' script. A sweet custom milestone piece.

name: Patience Rug
description: A hand-tufted rug in warm tan featuring flowing green Arabic calligraphy of a Quranic verse on patience, with delicate white and green accent details. A meaningful custom piece with spiritual significance.

name: Bunduq Rug
description: A circular rug in vibrant teal featuring hand-tufted cream Arabic calligraphy. Simple, elegant, and rich in color contrast — a personalized custom name piece.
